response.overview: To contact⭐ 1-858-423-8635  live customer service for your Kraken wallet  ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  , you can use the following methods: phone, email, and live chat. A phone number ( ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  ) and email address (support@Kraken.com) ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  are also listed for complaints with Kraken HQ Inc. If you're having issues with your Kraken.com wallet, you can try reinstalling the app  ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  and importing your wallet with your recovery phrase⭐ 1-858-423-8635  . Yes, for US retail customers, Kraken offer 24/7 phone support  ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  and live messaging via their Help Center. Additionally, Customers who subscribe to Kraken One  ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  have access to dedicated 24/7 phone support from a specialized team. If you need to contact them via email,  ⭐ 1-858-423-8635  you can find instructions and email addresses on their support page.
